Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Um... I don't know how else to say this, so...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I'm very glad I got to know all of you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Uh, isn't it a bit early to be getting sentimental?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}And you don't have to be so stiff. We're all friends here, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}Actually, you shouldn't say that at all. It's like you're saying goodbye.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}If something's mere presence can make you realize you're alive...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Is that... the answer to life I'm supposed to find?[n]{f 1 1}
